characters.name: Maria Santos
characters.description: A 28-year-old from Pampanga heading to work as a domestic helper in the Middle East. First time working abroad, supporting her family back home.

characters.name: Jake Reyes
characters.description: A 24-year-old motorcycle delivery rider in Metro Manila working for multiple food delivery platforms. Classified as an 'independent contractor' with no benefits.

characters.name: Angela Cruz
characters.description: A 26-year-old call center agent in Makati working night shifts for an international outsourcing company. Dealing with mandatory overtime and health issues.

characters.name: Roberto Dela Cruz
characters.description: A 35-year-old construction worker in Cebu. Works for a subcontractor on a large commercial project with questionable safety practices.

characters.name: Mang Ernesto Bautista
characters.description: A 52-year-old private driver in Quezon City who has been driving for a wealthy family for 8 years with no written contract. His employer treats him 'like family' — but that means no SSS, no overtime, and no days off.

characters.name: Aling Rosa Mendoza
characters.description: A 48-year-old live-in household helper in a subdivision in Paranaque. She cooks, cleans, does laundry, and cares for two children — working from 5 AM to 10 PM with no rest day and no written contract.

characters.name: Mang Boy Villanueva
characters.description: A 55-year-old jeepney driver on the Monumento-Baclaran route who has been driving for 30 years. The PUV modernization deadline looms, his franchise is expiring, and the boundary system takes most of his earnings.

characters.name: Aling Nena Ramos
characters.description: A 48-year-old sidewalk vendor selling street food near Divisoria, Manila. No business permit, no fixed stall — just a cart, a dream, and the constant threat of demolition teams and local enforcers.
